2604.20225.title: The GaoYao Benchmark: A Comprehensive Framework for Evaluating Multilingual and Multicultural Abilities of Large Language Models
2604.20225.paper_summary: Evaluating the multilingual and multicultural capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) is essential for their global utility. However, current benchmarks face three critical limitations: (1) fragmented evaluation dimensions that often neglect deep cultural nuances; (2) insufficient language coverage in subjective tasks relying on low-quality machine translation; and (3) shallow analysis that lacks diagnostic depth beyond simple rankings. To address these, we introduce GaoYao, a comprehensive benchmark with 182.3k samples, 26 languages and 51 nations/areas. First, GaoYao proposes a unified framework categorizing evaluation tasks into three cultural layers (General Multilingual, Cross-cultural, Monocultural) and nine cognitive sub-layers. Second, we achieve native-quality expansion by leveraging experts to rigorously localize subjective benchmarks into 19 languages and synthesizing cross-cultural test sets for 34 cultures, surpassing prior coverage by up to 111%. Third, we conduct an in-depth diagnostic analysis on 20+ flagship and compact LLMs. Our findings reveal significant geographical performance disparities and distinct gaps between tasks, offering a reliable map for future work. We release the benchmark (https://github.com/lunyiliu/GaoYao).
2604.20225.paper_summary_zh: 評估大型語言模型（LLMs）的多語言和多文化能力對於其全球實用性至關重要。<lb/>然而，目前的基準面臨三個關鍵限制：（1）碎片化的評估維度，往往忽視深層文化細微差別；<lb/>（2）在依賴低質量機器翻譯的主觀任務中，語言覆蓋不足；<lb/>以及（3）缺乏超越簡單排名的診斷深度的淺層分析。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，我們推出了GaoYao，一個擁有182.3k樣本、26種語言和51個國家/地區的綜合基準。<lb/>首先，GaoYao提出了一個統一框架，將評估任務分類為三個文化層次（一般多語言、跨文化、單一文化）和九個認知子層。<lb/>其次，我們通過利用專家嚴格本地化主觀基準到19種語言，並為34種文化合成跨文化測試集，實現了本土化質量的擴展，超越了先前的覆蓋率高達111%。<lb/>第三，我們對20多個旗艦和緊湊型LLMs進行了深入的診斷分析。<lb/>我們的發現揭示了顯著的地理性能差異和任務之間的明顯差距，為未來的工作提供了一個可靠的地圖。<lb/>我們發布了這個基準（https://github.com/lunyiliu/GaoYao）。
2604.20225.author: Yilun Liu et.al.
2604.20225.authors: Yilun Liu, Chunguang Zhao, Mengyao Piao, Lingqi Miao, Shimin Tao, Minggui He, Chenxin Liu, Li Zhang, Hongxia Ma, Jiaxin Guo, Chen Liu, Liqun Deng, Jiansheng Wei, Xiaojun Meng, Fanyi Du, Daimeng Wei, Yanghua Xiao
